Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS KEVIN JOHNSON AND CARL STOREY, JR.'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is taken off calendar. The Court signed an Order Granting Motion for Preliminary Approval of Class Action Settlement on February 6, 2015. The Final Fairness Hearing in this case is scheduled for June 10, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIC A. GROVER of Keller Grover, LLP, Tel No. (415) 543-1305 appearing for Plaintiffs;
Atty. ROBERT D. VOGEL of Jackson Lewis, P.C., Tel No. (213) 689-0404.

The Court required parties to appear. The Court and counsel discussed the Court's concerns regarding the proposed notice to class members. The Court indicated that the notice needs to be more clear on the front of the notice of the amount of money many stand to gain. The Court indicated that it was inclined to approve the proposed reversion and the proposed attorney's fees and costs amounts. The Court continued PLAINTIFFS KEVIN JOHNSON AND CARL STOREY, JR. ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement to Wednesday, February 18th, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. Parties shall e-mail the Court a revised notice, and proposed order. Parties need not appear on 2/18/15 if there is a signed order in this matter prior to that date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
